name: Chicken with Mexi-Corn Salsa
recipeIngredient: 6 Breasts, chicken, halves - broiler/fryer, boned, skinned
recipeInstructions:
1. See recipe for Mexi-Corn Salsa.
2. Melt the butter in a large fry pan over medium heat.
3. Add chicken and sprinkle with salt. Cook, turning occasionally, for about 6 minutes or until the chicken is light brown on all sides.
4. Cover; reduce heat to medium-low. Cook for about 5 minutes more, or until the chicken is fork tender.
5. Arrange the chicken on a serving platter. Spoon Mexi-Corn Salsa over the chicken.
6. Garnish with cherry tomatoes and cilantro.
